title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that generates customer replies in a user's own voice. The tool was created by Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager with no coding experience, using Claude Code to automate administrative work for sales representatives.
